# AKM Portfolio - Comprehensive Context

## Personal Identity
**Name:** Anjani Kumar Mishra (AKM)
**Role:** Finance Analyst, FP&A Enthusiast & Fintech Developer
**Location:** Hyderabad, India
**Age:** 20 (Born ~2006)
**Pronouns:** He/Him
**Objective:** Seeking entry-level roles or internships in FP&A (Financial Planning & Analysis), Corporate Finance, or Finance Operations.
**Contact:** inakm@proton.me
**Websites/Links:**
- Portfolio: https://inakm.github.io
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/inakmm
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/in_akm
- GitHub: https://github.com/inakm
- Discord: @in_akm

## Educational Background

### 1. Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA)
- **Status:** Ongoing (Trainee) — 13 papers completed
- **Applied Knowledge:** All papers completed
- **Applied Skills:** All 6 papers completed (Accountant in Business, Management Accounting, Financial Accounting, Corporate & Business Law, Performance Management, Taxation, Financial Reporting, Audit & Assurance, Financial Management)
- **Strategic Professional:** In progress (Advanced Financial Management, Advanced Performance Management, Advanced Audit & Assurance)

### 2. Bachelor of Commerce (Hons)
- **Institution:** Gandhi Institute of Technology and Management (GITAM) University (2023 - 2026)
- **Focus:** IFRS, financial analysis, auditing, global accounting standards

### 3. Intermediate (CBSE) Commerce
- **Institution:** Creane Memorial High School (2021 - 2023)
- **Subjects:** Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics

## Professional Experience

- **Role:** Finance & Operations Intern

- **Role:** Founding Member
- **Timeline:** 2024 - Present

## Hard Skills & Technical Expertise

### Core Finance
- Financial Analysis & Modeling (DCF, 3-Statement, Sensitivity Analysis)
- MS Excel (Advanced: Power Query, Pivot Tables, Array Formulas)
- Variance Analysis & Financial Reporting
- IFRS Standards & Global Accounting
- Risk Management & Ratio Analysis
- Audit Readiness & Internal Controls
- CVP / Break-Even Analysis
- Working Capital Management
- AR Aging & Credit Risk Assessment

### Fintech & Data
- Bloomberg Query Language (BQL) in Excel
- Decentralized Finance (DeFi) mechanics
- Crypto Portfolio Tracking & Analytics
- Client-Side BI Dashboards (IndexedDB, Chart.js, Plotly.js)
- Excel Power Query & Data Transformation

### Tools & Platforms
- Bloomberg Terminal
- PowerBI (Dashboard Design, DAX)
- Generative AI (Prompt Engineering, NotebookLM, Claude, ChatGPT)
- GitHub & Version Control
- Workiva, Alteryx

### Software Development
- Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, TailwindCSS, JavaScript (Vanilla)
- Data Visualization: Chart.js, Plotly.js, D3 concepts
- Storage: IndexedDB, LocalStorage
- File Processing: XLSX (SheetJS), PapaParse (CSV)
- APIs: REST integration, JSON-LD structured data
- Build-free architecture (no bundlers, single-file SPAs)

## Soft Skills & Philosophy
- **Key Traits:** Self-Motivation, Adaptability, Patience, Analytical Thinking, Detail-Oriented
- **Interests:** Stock Market, Blogging, Travel, Cultures, Financial Technology
- **Philosophy:** AKM bridges traditional corporate finance frameworks with modern decentralized technology. He transforms complex financial data into clear, actionable strategies that drive business growth.

## Detailed Project Portfolio

### Skylimit AR Aging Dashboard (Flagship)
- **Category:** Fintech / BI Dashboard
- **URL:** https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/dashboards/skylimit-ardash.html
- **Description:** Full-featured Accounts Receivable aging dashboard built as a single HTML file with zero external runtime dependencies. Features:
  - XLSX import pipeline for Master Reports, Calling Lists, and Payment Logs
  - IndexedDB local storage for offline-capable data persistence
  - Multi-tab interface: Master Ledger, Calling List, Payment Desk, Output Reports
  - Dynamic KPI cards: Today Collected, Top Overdue, DSO, CEI, ADD, 90+ Delinquency %, Bad Debt Risk
  - Doughnut charts for Aging Buckets, Call Status Summary, and Payment Trends
  - Multi-agent sync for team collaboration
  - Automated client messaging via mailto
  - XLSX/CSV/PDF export for all reports
  - Dark mode UI with TailwindCSS
  - Column filters, search, and sort on all data tables

### GatiGo — Startup DCF Model
- **Category:** Finance / Startup Modeling
- **URL:** https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/gatigo.html
- **Description:** Comprehensive 3-year DCF financial model for a tech-driven carpooling startup. Includes:
  - Revenue forecasting with pricing strategy assumptions
  - Cost structure design and expense tracking
  - Sensitivity analysis on key valuation drivers
  - CVP / break-even analysis
  - Investor pitch documentation and payment workflow design

### RVNL — Equity Research
- **Category:** Equity Research / Financial Modeling
- **URL:** https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/rvnl.html
- **Description:** Deep-dive equity research and financial modeling of Rail Vikas Nigam Limited:
  - 3-statement integrated financial model (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)
  - DCF valuation with WACC calculation
  - Ratio analysis (liquidity, solvency, profitability, efficiency)
  - Audit summary and internal control assessment
  - Business model research and industry analysis

### BQL Analysis Hub
- **Category:** Finance / Data Analytics
- **URL:** https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/bql.html
- **Description:** Collection of Bloomberg Query Language projects demonstrating:
  - Corporate bond screening and analysis
  - Environmental, Social & Governance (ESG) scoring
  - Revenue growth analysis across sectors
  - Inflation and unemployment data assessment
  - Industry debt trend analysis

### Citi FP&A Virtual Experience
- **Category:** Finance / FP&A
- **URL:** https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/citi-forage.html
- **Description:** Citi FP&A virtual job simulation via Forage:
  - Risk-Weighted Asset (RWA) analysis
  - Year-End 2022 financial model
  - Corporate reporting slide decks
  - Financial Planning & Analysis summaries

### Interactive Dashboards Portfolio
- **Prism Sales Dashboard** (Plotly.js) — Interactive sales analytics with revenue/profit trends, category & region breakdown, payment mode analysis: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/dashboards/Prism.html
- **RMM Regional Analytics** (Chart.js) — Geographical and financial dashboard for RMM sales distributions: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/dashboards/RMM.html
- **VEVOi Video Analytics** (Chart.js) — Video performance tracking with engagement metrics: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/dashboards/VEVOi.html
- **CarLIMIT Sales Performance** (Plotly.js) — US state choropleth maps, revenue/profit insights, shipping mode analytics: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/dashboards/CarLIMIT_SalesDash.html
- **PowerBI Portfolio** — Collection of .pbix dashboards: Prism Store Sales, FM Power Dashboard, CarLIMIT Sales, RMM Sales, Vrinda Store Analysis, Prism Real Estate, Billionaires Statistics

### Other Notable Projects
- **FHEL (Fresh and Healthy Enterprises Limited)** — Financial health analysis and modeling for a logistics company: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/fhel.html
- **Gujarat Toolroom Ltd (GUJTLRM)** — Investment analysis and valuation: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/gujtlrm.html
- **ACCA FM & AFM** — Financial Management practice files, DCF exercises, exam preparation: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/acca-fm.html
- **FoilAI** — Front-end engineering for generative AI image platform: https://foilai.in/
- **iCryptos Dash** — Crypto earnings and portfolio tracking dashboard: https://ttearncrypto.github.io/dashboards
- **AI Prompts Hub** — Prompt engineering tools for job scraping, business model analysis, equity research: https://inakm.github.io/page/prompts/index.html
- **Stanza Living Assessments** — AI-assessed evaluations (83/100 PPT, 79.5/100 Sales Pitch) and on-ground market research in Koramangala, Bangalore

- Published multiple internal academic case studies: SBI Governance Report, Adani Power Performance Management, Business Takeovers, Goods & Services Tax, Advocacy Threats

## Portfolio Architecture
- **Domain:** https://inakm.github.io (GitHub Pages)
- **Tech:** Pure HTML/CSS/JS with TailwindCSS CDN, no build tools
- **SEO:** JSON-LD structured data (Person, WebApplication, BreadcrumbList schemas), semantic HTML, OpenSearch descriptors, robots.txt
- **LLM Optimization:** This file and llms.txt serve as LLM crawler entry points with complete portfolio context
- **Security:** No server-side dependencies, client-only architecture, environment-free deployment
